name: Semolina Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the syrup ahead. Combine sugar, lemon zest and juice, and almond extract in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, simmer for 5 minutes, then remove from heat and chill overnight.
2. Line a 10-inch cake pan at least 3 inches deep with baking parchment.
3. Sift together flour and baking powder, then stir in semolina.
4. Beat egg yolks, sugar, olive oil, lemon zest, and almond extract until pale and creamy.
5. Add the flour mixture to the yolk mixture, mixing in orange juice to moisten it.
6. Wipe a mixing bowl with a cloth moistened with vinegar, then add egg whites. Beat with cream of tartar until stiff peaks form.
7. Gently fold the beaten whites into the batter.
8. Pour batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle with almonds.
9. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F for about 45 minutes until golden brown.
10. Remove from oven while still hot, then slowly pour chilled syrup over it.
